user.title: Add a Plant
user.description: Set up basic care settings for your plant.

data_description.plant_name: A friendly name for this plant.
data_description.area: Assign this plant to a Home Assistant area.
data_description.label: Optional sublabel to group plants within an area (e.g. Left shelf, Window sill). Leave blank if not needed.
data_description.early_watering_threshold: How many early waterings before the interval is shortened by 1 day.
data_description.snooze_threshold: How many consecutive periods snoozed before the interval is increased by 1 day.
data_description.health_prompt_interval_days: How many days before a health check-in notification is sent.

features.title: Optional Features
features.description: Enable optional features for this plant.

data_description.moisture_sensor: Select an existing sensor to drive automatic watering logic.

last_watered.title: Last Watering
last_watered.description: When did you last water this plant?

last_watered_custom.title: Last Watering - Custom Date
last_watered_custom.description: Enter the date you last watered this plant.

last_fertilized.title: Last Fertilization
last_fertilized.description: When did you last fertilize this plant?

last_fertilized_custom.title: Last Fertilization - Custom Date
last_fertilized_custom.description: Enter the date you last fertilized this plant.

image.title: Plant Image
image.description: Enter a path to an image in your /local/ folder (e.g. /local/IMG_4743.jpeg).

moisture.title: Moisture Thresholds
moisture.description: Set the thresholds for dry and wet moisture readings.

error.dry_above_wet: Dry threshold must be less than wet threshold.

data_description.label: Optional sublabel to group plants within an area (e.g. Left shelf, Window sill). Leave blank to remove.

error.dry_above_wet: Dry threshold must be less than wet threshold.
